holdings.infoBox: SIXA is an equity ETF with a total of 52 individual holdings. The top holdings are Altria Group stock at 5.43%, Verizon Communications at 3.96%, PepsiCo at 3.94%, AT&T Inc. at 3.74%, and Lam Research at 3.03%.

overview.description: The ETC 6 Meridian Mega Cap Equity ETF (SIXA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in large-cap US equities selected from the Russell 3000 Index. SIXA was launched on May 11, 2020 and is issued by Exchange Traded Concepts.
